metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Short lowercase-alphanumeric prefix used to name all resources.
Container image reference (without tag) in the internal ACR. Typically "<acr-login-server>/kmp".
Image tag to deploy (e.g. "nightly" or "nightly-2026-04-17").
Release channel exposed to the application runtime.
Postgres admin login name.
Postgres admin password (also used as the application credential for nightly — no separate app role).
Postgres application database name.
Postgres platform metadata database name. Platform schedules, tenants, jobs, and secret metadata live here.
CakePHP Security.salt value (generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`).
Backup encryption key. Must match the key used to bake the nightly .kmpbackup file. Keep this in sync with deploy/azure/seed/.
Master key used by the database-backed platform secret store. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
SMTP host for outbound mail (e.g. Mailpit reused from UAT).
SMTP port for outbound mail.
SMTP username (leave empty for unauthenticated Mailpit).
SMTP password (leave empty for unauthenticated Mailpit).
Whether SMTP uses TLS.
From address for outgoing mail.
Object ID of the principal that should have Key Vault Secrets Officer access for initial secret population (usually the deployer).
ACR name. Must be pre-computed by the bootstrap script so that the image can be imported before the rest of the deployment runs.
Whether to provision Azure Front Door in front of the Container App.
Front Door SKU to use when deployFrontDoor is true.
Optional custom domains for Front Door. Each item should be { name: string, hostName: string }. DNS/certificate validation remains an operational step.
Global switch for provisioning Container Apps Jobs. Jobs are fixed schedule shapes; tenant fan-out happens in platform schedules and queue tables.
Enable the manual migration/canary job.
Enable the manual restore-from-seed job.
Enable the manual tenant provision job shape. Operators override args when starting it for a specific tenant.
Enable the scheduled queue worker job.
Cron for the queue worker schedule shape.
Maximum concurrent queue worker replicas per scheduled execution.
Replica timeout, in seconds, for each queue worker execution.
Maximum queue jobs processed per queue worker execution.
Enable the hourly platform schedule dispatcher job.
Platform schedule name dispatched by the hourly schedule-shape job.
Cron for the hourly platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the daily platform schedule dispatcher job.
Platform schedule name dispatched by the daily schedule-shape job.
Cron for the daily platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the weekly platform schedule dispatcher job.
Platform schedule name dispatched by the weekly schedule-shape job.
Cron for the weekly platform schedule dispatcher.
Enable the nightly maintenance platform schedule dispatcher job.
Platform schedule name dispatched by the nightly maintenance schedule-shape job.
Cron for the nightly maintenance platform schedule dispatcher.
Maximum concurrent replicas for each platform schedule dispatcher execution. Keep at 1 unless schedule rows are idempotent.
